channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 25.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Burnham has set himself a hard task, but I dont think we really know the dynamics of a by-election serving as a test prime ministerial run from a popular local figure, because it's madness and has never happened.
item.description: Burnham has set himself a hard task, but I dont think we really know the dynamics of a by-election serving as a test prime ministerial run from a popular local figure, because it's madness and has never happened.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Burnham seeks to stand in by-election paving way for Labour leadership challenge
item.description: Starmer latest: Burnham seeks to stand in by-election paving way for Labour leadership challenge

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Farage says Reform UK will ‘throw absolutely everything’ at winning Makerfield byelection - UK politics live
item.description: Farage says Reform UK will ‘throw absolutely everything’ at winning Makerfield byelection - UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: The fact that Keir Starmer has drafted Morgan McSweeney back in to save him has to be funniest part of all of this. Truly committed to never learning a single lesson you have to give it to him
item.description: The fact that Keir Starmer has drafted Morgan McSweeney back in to save him has to be funniest part of all of this. Truly committed to never learning a single lesson you have to give it to him

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Every Labour MP who has demanded Starmer quit as number reaches 96
item.description: Every Labour MP who has demanded Starmer quit as number reaches 96

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Will Starmer go – and if so, how? Four scenarios in the battle for No 10
item.description: Will Starmer go – and if so, how? Four scenarios in the battle for No 10

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting quits cabinet and calls on Starmer to resign
item.description: Wes Streeting quits cabinet and calls on Starmer to resign

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work? These are the next steps
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work? These are the next steps

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): What would potential Labour leadership candidates do differently to Starmer?
item.description: What would potential Labour leadership candidates do differently to Starmer?

item.title: BBC Politics: Andy Burnham: 'King of the North' with eyes on the top job
item.description: Andy Burnham: 'King of the North' with eyes on the top job
